Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Ozmanthus Arelius]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 1''' — Ozmanthus Arelius is a character who looked up into falling ash and felt he had failed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 10''' — Ozmanthus Arelius had maximum potential in six of the seven Abidan Divisions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 10''' — Ozmanthus Arelius could inherit the Mantle of any Judge except Suriel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 10''' — Ozmanthus Arelius was the original Patriarch of the Arelius clan and a great Soulsmith.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 14''' — Ozmanthus Arelius was an Arelius Patriarch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 21''' — Ozmanthus Arelius left a Soulsmith inheritance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 21''' — Ozmanthus Arelius appears as a black-and-white version of himself.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 23''' — Ozmanthus Arelius dismantled techniques.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 2''' — Ozmanthus Arelius had disused workshops within the labyrinth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 2''' — An echo of Ozmanthus Arelius appeared as a gray-white ghost.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 2''' — The echo of Ozmanthus Arelius uses a broom.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 4''' — Ozmanthus Arelius ascended into the heavens.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 4''' — Ozmanthus Arelius was one of the greatest Soulsmiths of all time.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 9''' — Lindon adopted a madra manipulation method from Ozmanthus Arelius.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 9''' — A black-and-gray Ozmanthus Arelius appeared next to Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 10''' — Ozmanthus Arelius is laughing from within the narrator.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 18''' — Ozmanthus Arelius is Yerin's master.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 22''' — Reigan absorbed the Soulsmith inheritance of Ozmanthus Arelius.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 33''' — Ozmanthus Arelius's Soulsmith inheritance is taunting the Remnant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 37''' — Ozmanthus Arelius is a figure of pride for Eithan.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 2''' — Ozmanthus Arelius exists as a Forged echo in the labyrinth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 2''' — Ozmanthus Arelius has pale hair and a gentle smile.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 2''' — Ozmanthus Arelius is part of the Arelius family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 2''' — Ozmanthus Arelius spent years studying the first Abidan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 2''' — Ozmanthus Arelius's echo has colorless eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 2''' — Ozmanthus Arelius wears Forged clothes.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
